title: The U.S. Added 1,200 New Millionaires a Day Last Year
abstract: Imagine the shock of realizing that America added 1,200 new millionaires every single day last year! It’s not just a plot twist; it's like a TV series come to life. Picture your friends suddenly becoming “golden parents” – talk about a gripping narrative!
abstract_zh: 你可能觉得一夜暴富是电影情节，但去年美国每天竟然新增了1,200个百万富豪！这可不是啥小事儿，简直比新剧集还火。想象一下，你身边的人突然成了“金主爸爸”，这剧情多带感啊！
